word: G4911 - συνεφίστημι - synephístēmi - soon-ef-is'-tay-mee - Rise up together

sections.paragraph:
- Original: συνεφίστημι

- Transliteration: sunephistemi

- Phonetic: soon-ef-is'-tay-mee

- Definition:

1. to place over or appoint together

2. to rise up together

a. against one

- Origin: from G4862 and G2186

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G4862 and G2186; to stand up together that is to resist (or assault) jointly: - rise up together.
